author: Авакумов Данил Эдуардович
objective: Define the strict documentation-first execution package for importing Belnap alignment, diversity taxonomy, error/erasure modeling, and channel-aware memory into the rebooted BDC scientific line.
research_question: Can BDC convert the strongest external scientific inputs into a bounded and ordered reboot-line work package before implementation begins?

execution_rules.phase_gate: May start only after the research reboot line is documented through the reboot plan and charter.

out_of_scope: implementation of semantics or memory mechanisms
new scientific claims beyond the planning package
